kirundi.read_v_formation_explanation_aloud: Soma ibisobanuro vy'imiterere ya V mu ijwi riranguruye
kirundi.v_formation_simulator_canvas_drag_bird: Ikibaho c'igerageza ry'imiterere ya V. Kurura inyoni kugira ngo uhindure aho ziri. Inyoni iyobora yashizweho ikimenyetso c'inyenyeri. Uduti tw'ingufu hejuru ya buri nyoni tugaragaza urwego rw'ingufu zayo z'ubu. Uduhimbano tw'icatsi inyuma ya buri nyoni tugaragaza uturere tw'umwuka-hejuru, aho inyoni zo inyuma zibika ingufu. Agace gatukura kigororotse inyuma kagaragaza agace k'umwuka-hasi.
kirundi.by_positioning_themselves_in_the_upwas: Mu kwishira mu gace k'umwuka-hejuru — hafi 30° inyuma no ku ruhande rw'inyoni iri imbere — inyoni zo inyuma zibona inkunga y'ubuntu ituruka ku mwuka uzamuka. Mu mikumbi nyayo ibi bibika hafi
kirundi.the_leader_gets_no_benefit_and_tires_f: Umuyobozi ntabwo abona inyungu na rimwe kandi ananirwa vuba. Iyo ingufu ze zigabanutse munsi ya 30%, asubira inyuma indi nyoni ikayobora. Ibi vyitwa
kirundi.in_nature_every_bird_takes_a_turn_at_t: . Mu buzima buri nyoni ifata igihe cayo imbere.
kirundi.try_dragging_birds_into_different_posi: Gerageza gukurura inyoni ahantu hatandukanye kugira ngo urabe uko akamaro k'imiterere no kubika ingufu bihinduka! Fyonda V kugira ngo ukore mu buryo bwikoresha, S kugira ngo usakaze.
kirundi.adjust_the_sliders_to_see_how_distance: Hindura utuyoboro kugira ngo urabe uko intera, ingano y'umubiri, umuyaga n'imiterere bigira ingaruka ku vyo inyoni ikeneye mu ngufu. Ibi bigana fiziki nyayo y'indege yo kwimuka.
kirundi.a_feeding_frenzy_where_they_may_double: — ukurya birenze, aho zishobora kuvyaza kabiri ibiro vy'umubiri wazo mu binure. Bar-tailed Godwit itwika
kirundi.during_its_7_145_mile_non_stop_flight_: mu gihe c'indege yayo ya kilometero 7,145 idahagarara kuva Alaska kugera New Zealand.
kirundi.this_journey_requires_more_fat_than_th: ⚠️ Uru rugendo rusaba ibinure birenze ibiro vy'inyoni! Ruzasaba ahantu ho kongera lisansi — canke imiterere ya V kugira ngo bigabanye ikiguzi.
kirundi.some_birds_migrate_at_extreme_altitude: Inyoni zimwe zimuka ku burebure bukabije — Bar-headed Geese zambuka Himalaya ku metero 29,000. Kurura utuyoboro kugira ngo urabe uko ibihe bihinduka.
kirundi.bar_headed_geese_survive_here_thanks_t: Bar-headed Geese zibaho hano bitewe na hemoglobine ifata ogisijeni cane, ibihaha binini na mitochondriya ikora neza. Inyamaswa nyinshi zonsa zaba zataye ubwenge kuri ubu burebure. Amaraso yazo afite ihinduka ryihariye rya hemoglobine (Pro→Ala ku mwanya wa 119) ryongera ikurura ry'ogisijeni ku 50%.
kirundi.many_songbirds_migrate_at_this_range_w: Inyoni nyinshi ziririmba zimuka muri iyi ntera, aho umwuka woroheje ugabanya ikururwa ariko ogisijeni ni nkeya. Inyoni zivyishura binyuze mu guhumeka neza: sisitemu yazo y'umuyaga w'icerekezo kimwe isohora ogisijeni mu gihe co guhumeka no gusohora umwuka, bitandukanye n'ibihaha vy'inyamaswa zonsa bisohora ogisijeni gusa mu gihe co guhumeka.
kirundi.most_migrants_fly_between_5_000_15_000: Abimuka benshi baguruka hagati ya metero 5,000 na 15,000. Ubushuhe bw'umwuka bugabanuka hafi 3.5 °F kuri buri metero 1,000 (gradiyenti isanzwe y'ubushuhe). Inyoni zitoranya uburebure kugira ngo zibone umuyaga mwiza — inyoni imwe ishobora kuguruka metero 2,000 ijoro rimwe na metero 12,000 ijoro rikurikira.
kirundi.hummingbirds_and_some_shorebirds_fly_c: Ba-hummingbird n'inyoni zimwe zo ku nkombe baguruka hafi y'ubuso, cane cane hejuru y'amazi. Kuguruka hasi biratekanye ku mibare y'urubura, ariko bisigura kurwanya umwuka cane n'inkunga y'umuyaga nkeya. Iyo bambuka Ikigobe ca Mexico ca kilometero 600, inyoni nyinshi ziguruka hagati ya metero 1,000 na 3,000.
kirundi.thermals_are_columns_of_rising_warm_ai: Imigezi y'ubushuhe ni inkingi z'umwuka ushushe uzamuka zikorwa iyo izuba rishusha ubutaka mu buryo budahwitse. Ubuso bwijimye (aho bahagarika imodoka, imirima yahinzwe) bukora imigezi ikomeye kurusha ubuso bworoheje (amazi, amashamba). Inyoni ziguruka nka sekamugongo n'inkona zizamuka mu gikorwa c'inziga mu migezi y'ubushuhe, zibona uburebure zidakubise amababa. Hanyuma zishushanya zija ku mugezi ukurikira, zikora “umuhanda munini w'ubushuhe”, inzira yihuta ibika ingufu mu kirere.
kirundi.land_heats_faster_than_water_during_th: Ubutaka bushuha vuba kurusha amazi ku manywa. Umwuka ushushe uzamuka hejuru y'ubutaka umwuka ukonje ukava mu nyanja gufata umwanya wawo, ukora “umuyaga w'inyanja” werekeza ku nkombe. Nijoro imiterere ihinduka. Inyoni zimuka zikoresha iyi miyaga y'inkombe ishobora guhanurwa kugira ngo zibike ingufu. Agace k'ihuriro, aho umuyaga w'inyanja uhurira n'umwuka wo mu gihugu, akenshi ukora imigezi y'ubushuhe inyoni zikoresha kugira ngo zibone uburebure.
kirundi.high_altitude_jet_streams_are_narrow_b: Imigezi ya jet y'uburebure bwo hejuru ni imikandara migufi y'umuyaga wihuta cane (100-200 mph) ku metero 30,000-40,000. Nubwo inyoni nyinshi ziguruka hasi cane y'imigezi ya jet, abimuka bamwe nka Bar-tailed Godwit bazamuka hejuru ya metero 20,000 kugira ngo bafate umuyaga mwiza w'uburebure bwo hejuru. Inzuzi zabonetse na radar ku metero 29,000 hejuru ya Himalaya, aho ogisijeni ari nkeya n'ubushuhe bukamanuka kugera -50 °F.
kirundi.wind_shear_is_a_sudden_change_in_wind_: Ikata ry'umuyaga ni impinduka itunguranye mu muvuduko canke icerekezo c'umuyaga mu ntera ngufi. Ni akaga ku nyoni no ku ndege. Mu gihe c'inkuba, uduturika duto (inkingi zitunguranye z'umwuka umanuka) bikora ikata ry'umuyaga rikaze hafi y'ubutaka. Inyoni ziyumva impinduka z'umuvuduko kandi akenshi zisubika kwimuka iyo imbere z'inkuba zegereye.
kirundi.admiral_sir_francis_beaufort_created_h: Admiral Sir Francis Beaufort yakoze igipimo cye c'umuyaga mu 1805 ashingiye ku ngaruka z'umuyaga ku mato afite amatanga. Igipimo ca Beaufort ca none gikoresha kwitegereza ku butaka: imbaraga 0 (amahoro) = umwotsi uzamuka utambitse; imbaraga 6 (umuyaga ukomeye) = amashami manini aranyeganyega, amakofero arahinduka; imbaraga 12 (inkubi) = kurimbura. Inyoni nyinshi zikunda kwimuka ku mbaraga 2-4 (umuyaga woroheje kugera ku ringaniye).
kirundi.migrants_strongly_prefer_flying_with_t: Abimuka bakunda cane kuguruka umuyaga uri inyuma yabo. Umuyaga wo inyuma wa 15 mph gusa wongera kabiri umuvuduko w'inyoni ku butaka mu buryo bwiza ku giciro kimwe c'ingufu. Ubushakashatsi bwerekana ko kwimuka kw'inyoni ari inshuro 10 kurushaho ku minsi yo kwimuka ifite umuyaga mwiza wo inyuma kuruta ku minsi y'umuyaga wo imbere.
kirundi.albatrosses_exploit_wind_speed_gradien: Ba-albatros bakoresha gradiyenti y'umuvuduko w'umuyaga hejuru y'imiraba y'inyanja. Mu guhinduranya hagati yo kuzamuka mu muyaga wihuta no kurohama mu muyaga wihuta gake hafi y'ubuso, basohora ingufu ziturutse ku ikata ry'umuyaga ubwaryo. Albatros ishobora kuguruka kilometero ibihumbi idakubise amababa cane.
kirundi.when_wind_hits_a_cliff_face_or_ridge_t: Iyo umuyaga ukubise urutare canke impinga, umwuka usubira inyuma ukora “umuraba” wo kuzamura ukurikira umurongo w'impinga. Inyoni z'inyamanswa ziguruka hejuru y'iyi migezi y'impinga mu gihe co kwimuka, zihuza imisozi nko gusimbuka ku mabuye. Hawk Mountain muri Pennsylvania izwi cane kubera iki kintu.
kirundi.experiment_place_a_thermal_and_a_mount: Ubushakashatsi: Shira umugezi w'ubushuhe n'umusozi ku rwuri, hanyuma wongereho inyoni. Yiraba iguruka hejuru y'imigezi izamuka!
kirundi.birds_are_exquisitely_sensitive_to_wea: Inyoni zumva cane impinduka z'ikirere kandi zakoreshejwe nka “barometero nzima” mu mateka yose:
kirundi.birds_can_detect_changes_in_barometric: Inyoni zishobora kumenya impinduka z'umuvuduko wa barometero bitewe n'abakira bihariye mu gutwi hagati (urugingo rwa paratympanic). Iyo umuvuduko ugabanutse mbere y'inkuba, inyoni akenshi ziguruka hasi kandi zirya cane. Inyoni za swallow ziguruka hasi ni ikimenyetso gisanzwe c'inkuba.
kirundi.autumn_migration_is_strongly_correlate: Kwimuka kw'igihe c'itumba bifitanye isano ikomeye no kunyura kw'imbere z'ubukonje. Inyoni ziguruka hejuru y'imiyaga yo mu majaruguru-uburengerazuba inyuma y'imbere z'ubukonje, itanga umuyaga wo inyuma n'ikirere gisukuye. Abitegereza inyoni bafite uburambe baraba amakarita y'ikirere kugira ngo bahanure amajoro yo hejuru yo kwimuka.
kirundi.fog_is_dangerous_for_migrating_birds_b: Igihu ni akaga ku nyoni zimuka kuko gihisha ibimenyetso vy'ubutaka n'ibimenyetso vyo kuyobora vyo mu kirere. Amajoro y'igihu afite umusingi w'ibicu biri hasi bitera “kugwa”, aho inyoni zimuka zananiwe zimanuka mu mikumbi ku hantu hambere haboneka. Ibi bintu, nubwo bibabaza inyoni, bikora amahirwe meza yo kwitegereza inyoni.
kirundi.when_the_swallows_fly_high_the_weather: “Iyo za swallow ziguruka hejuru, ikirere kizaba cumye. Iyo za swallow ziguruka hasi, imvura iri mu nzira.” — Iki gishushanyo c'imigenzo mu vy'ukuri ni ukuri mu buryo bwa siyansi: udukoko (ibiryo vya swallow) buguruka hejuru muri sisitemu z'umuvuduko wo hejuru no hasi mbere y'inkuba.
kirundi.critical_rest_stop_after_the_500_mile_: Ahantu ho kuruhukira h'ingenzi nyuma yo kwambuka Ikigobe ca Mexico ca kilometero 500
kirundi.600_000_sandhill_cranes_gather_here_ea: Sandhill Cranes 600,000 zikoranira hano buri gihe c'impeshi — kimwe mu bintu vyiza cane vyo kuraba vy'ibidukikije
kirundi.wetlands_here_support_40_of_north_amer: Ibishanga hano bishigikira 40% vy'inyoni z'amazi zimuka za Amerika y'Amajaruguru
kirundi.largest_estuary_in_the_us_critical_win: Estuwari nini kurusha izindi muri US — ahantu h'ingenzi ho gutura mu gihe c'itumba ku mbata n'inzuzi
kirundi.the_four_north_american_flyways: 🗺️ Inzira Enye zo Kuguruka za Amerika y'Amajaruguru
kirundi.migration_timing_varies_dramatically_b: Igihe co kwimuka gitandukanye cane bitewe n'ubwoko:
kirundi.early_spring_waterfowl_ducks_geese_hea: Intanguriro y'impeshi: Inyoni z'amazi (imbata, inzuzi) zerekeza mu majaruguru zikurikira gushonga kw'urubura. Red-winged Blackbirds zisubira mu bishanga.
kirundi.peak_spring_warblers_vireos_tanagers_f: Impinga y'impeshi: Warblers, vireos na tanagers zuzuza amajaruguru. Inyoni nyinshi ziririmba zimuka nijoro. Ku majoro yo hejuru harimwo inyoni zirenga miliyoni 500 mu kirere.
kirundi.shorebirds_start_south_some_species_fa: Inyoni zo ku nkombe zitangura mu majepfo — ubwoko bumwe “burananirwa” ahantu ho kororokera bugatangura gusubira mu ntanguriro ya Mukakaro. Abakuru akenshi bagenda mbere y'ivyana.
kirundi.peak_fall_raptors_ride_thermals_along_: Impinga y'itumba: Inyamanswa ziguruka hejuru y'imigezi y'ubushuhe hafi y'imisozi. Inyoni ziririmba zerekeza mu majepfo zikurikira imbere z'ubukonje. Inzuzi ziguruka mu miterere ya V nijoro.
kirundi.photoperiod_day_length_is_the_primary_: Uburebure bw'umunsi ni impamvu y'ibanze yo kwimuka. Uko iminsi igabanuka mu itumba, hormone zitera “Zugunruhe” — kutaruhuka kwo kwimuka — kandi inyoni zitangura gukusanya ububiko bw'ibinure (kurya birenze), rimwe na rimwe zivyaza kabiri ibiro vy'umubiri.
kirundi.critical_to_survival_a_migrating_warbl: h'ingenzi mu kubaho. Warbler yimuka ishobora gukoresha 75% vy'igihe co kwimuka ku hantu ho guhagarara, irya cane kugira ngo yubake ububiko bw'ibinure. Ahantu ho gutura ho guhagarara ho kwiza hashobora kuba itandukaniro riri hagati y'ubuzima n'urupfu.
kirundi.at_delaware_bay_over_1_million_shorebi: Kuri Delaware Bay, inyoni zo ku nkombe zirenga miliyoni 1 (Red Knots, Ruddy Turnstones, Sanderlings) zishingira ku magi y'inkona y'ifarasi yateweho muri Rusama. Igihe kigomba kuba ciza rwose: inyoni zigera igihe nyaco inkona z'ifarasi zibika amagi. Nimba umubare w'inkona z'ifarasi ugabanutse (kubera uburovyi burenze bw'inyoni), urunigi rwose rwo kwimuka rurasenyuka.
kirundi.conservation_success_story_after_horse: Inkuru y'intsinzi yo kubungabunga: Nyuma yo gushiraho imipaka yo gusarura inkona z'ifarasi mu 2012, umubare wa Red Knot watangiye gukira buhoro buhoro uva ku rwego rwo hasi rw'ihindagurika rwa 15,000 kugera birenze 50,000 muri 2025.
kirundi.migration_is_one_of_the_most_physicall: Kwimuka ni kimwe mu bikorwa bisaba umubiri cane mu bwami bw'inyamaswa. Inyoni zinyuramo impinduka z'umubiri zitangaje mbere yo kugenda:
kirundi.before_migration_birds_enter_a_feeding: Mbere yo kwimuka, inyoni zinjira mu kurya birenze vyitwa hyperphagia, zirya ku muvuduko w'inshuro 2-3 kurusha ibisanzwe. Blackpoll Warbler (garamu 12) yongeraho ububiko bw'ibinure bwa garamu 8-12, hafi ivyaza kabiri ibiro vy'umubiri. Aya binure ni lisansi y'indege zidahagarara zirenga kilometero 2,000.
kirundi.high_altitude_migrants_like_bar_headed: Abimuka b'uburebure bwo hejuru nka Bar-headed Geese (ziguruka metero 29,000 hejuru ya Himalaya) bafite hemoglobine yihariye ifite ikurura rinini rya ogisijeni. Imikaya yabo irimwo myoglobine y'inyongera, kandi ubwinshi bwa kapilari yabo ni kabiri bw'ubwoko bwo hasi.
kirundi.some_birds_can_sleep_while_flying_usin: Inyoni zimwe zishobora gusinzira mu gihe ziguruka, zikoresha “ibitotsi vy'igice c'ubwonko” — zugara igice kimwe c'ubwonko icarimwe. Frigatebirds zanditswe zisinzira iminota 42 ku munsi mu gihe c'indege z'iminsi 10 zambuka inyanja, zifata ibitotsi bito vya segonda 12 buri kimwe.
kirundi.birds_maintain_an_internal_circadian_c: Inyoni zigumana isaha ya circadian yo imbere ifite ukuri gutangaje. Iyi saha yishura imigendere y'izuba mu kirere (busole y'izuba yishuwe igihe) kandi ikurikirana impinduka z'ibihe z'uburebure bw'umunsi zitera hormone zo kwimuka.
kirundi.zugunruhe_migration_restlessness_is_a_: Zugunruhe (“kutaruhuka kwo kwimuka”) ni imiterere y'imyitwarire aho inyoni zimuka zafunzwe mu kigo zikubita amababa mu cerekezo zaba zimuka mu buryo busanzwe, mu gihe zaba zimuka. Iterwa na hormone kandi yanditswe muri gene. N'inyoni zarezwe n'intoki zidafite uburambe bwo kwimuka zerekana Zugunruhe.
kirundi.our_understanding_of_migration_has_bee: Ukumva kwacu kwo kwimuka kwahinduwe cane n'ikoranabuhanga:
kirundi.since_1920_over_80_million_birds_have_: Kuva 1920, inyoni zirenga miliyoni 80 zashizweho impeta muri Amerika y'Amajaruguru. Buri mpeta ifite nomero yihariye. Iyo inyoni ifite impeta yongeye gufatwa, abahanga biga ku kubaho, inzira n'igihe. Igipimo co kongera kubona ni gito (1-5%), ariko amakuru ni menshi cane.
kirundi.solar_powered_gps_tags_now_as_small_as: Ibimenyetso vya GPS bikoresha ingufu z'izuba (ubu bito nka garamu 1) vyohereza amakuru y'ahantu binyuze kuri satelite. Bigaragaza inzira zihamye, ibihe vyo guhagarara n'uburebure bw'indege. Indege ya Godwit ya kilometero 7,145 idahagarara yakurikiranwe na GPS.
kirundi.light_level_geolocators_0_5g_record_su: Ba-geolocator b'urwego rw'urumuri (garamu 0.5) banditse ibihe vy'izuba rirasa n'izuba rirenga. Iyo inyoni yongeye gufatwa, abahanga basohora amakuru bakabara latitude (kuva ku burebure bw'umunsi) na longitude (kuva ku gihe co hagati y'amanywa c'izuba). Ukuri: ~200 km.
kirundi.nexrad_weather_radar_stations_across_t: Sitasiyo za radar y'ikirere za NEXRAD muri US zose zimenya imikumbi minini y'inyoni zimuka. BirdCast (Cornell Lab) ikoresha kwiga kwa mashini kugira ngo ihanure kandi yerekane kwimuka mu gihe nyaco kuva mu makuru ya radar. Ku majoro yo hejuru, radar yerekana amadoti manini y'icatsi yo kwimuka kw'inyoni.
kirundi.stall_angle_airflow_separates_from_the: (aya yo guhagarara) irengejwe, imigendere y'umwuka itandukana n'ubuso bwo hejuru. Ijaba ritakaza imigendere y'umwuka yoroshe, kuzamura kugwa cane, kandi gukurura kurasimbuka. Uku ni “guhagarara”.
kirundi.l_d_measures_aerodynamic_efficiency_a_: L/D ipima akamaro k'aerodinamike. L/D nini isigura kuzamura kwinshi kuri buri gice co gukurura. Ba-albatros bagera ku bipimo vya L/D vy'urwego rwa
kirundi.meaning_20_pounds_of_lift_for_every_1_: (bisigura livre 20 zo kuzamura kuri buri livre 1 yo gukurura), kimwe mu vyiza cane mu bidukikije. Ba-glider ba none
kirundi.bird_flight_operates_at_reynolds_numbe: Indege y'inyoni ikorera ku mibare ya Reynolds hagati ya 10,000 na 500,000 — sisitemu igoye ya aerodinamike. Kuri ibi bipimo urwego rw'umupaka (urwego ruto rw'umwuka rwomatanye n'ubuso bw'ijaba) ni igice ca laminaire, igice c'akaduruvayo. Amababa y'inyoni akora akaduruvayo-gato mu vy'ukuri
kirundi.maintain_airflow_attachment_especially: agumana ubwomeko bw'imigendere y'umwuka, cane cane ku maya manini y'igitero. Iki ni ikintu injeniyeri bakiri kugerageza kongera gukora mu bishushanyo vya drone.
kirundi.bird_flight_has_inspired_countless_eng: Indege y'inyoni yatije udushasha twinshi tw'ubwubatsi tudashobora kubarwa:
kirundi.the_upturned_wingtips_on_modern_airlin: Impera z'amababa zerekeje hejuru ku ndege za none z'abagenzi (Boeing 737 MAX, Airbus A350) zatewe ubwoba mu buryo butaziguye n'amababa y'impera acitse y'ikizu. Ba-“winglet” bagabanya gukurura gutewe kuri 5-7%, bakiza kompanyi z'indege miliyari z'igiciro ca lisansi ku mwaka. Bakora mu kumena umugezi w'impera y'ijaba.
kirundi.owl_feathers_have_a_serrated_leading_e: Amababa y'ibihunyira afite impera y'imbere ifite amenyo, imiterere y'ubuso nka velure, n'impera yo inyuma ifite udukingi, vyose hamwe bigabanya urusaku rwa aerodinamike hafi y'ituze. Injeniyeri bo muri GE na Dyson bigana ibiranga ku mababa ya turbine no ku bishushanyo vya fani, bagabanya urusaku birenga desibeli 10.
kirundi.the_shinkansen_bullet_train_s_nose_was: Izuru ry'igare ry'amasasu rya Shinkansen ryongeye gushushanywa nyuma y'uko injeniyeri witegereza inyoni Eiji Nakatsu abonye ba-kingfisher birohama kuva mu mwuka bakaja mu mazi batamennye amazi. Izuru rifite imiterere y'umunwa wa kingfisher ryagabanije guturika kw'ijwi kuri 30% n'ikoreshwa ry'amashanyarazi kuri 15% mu gihe igare rivaga mu bihagararo.
kirundi.birds_continuously_adjust_wing_shape_a: Inyoni zihora zihindura imiterere y'ijaba, aya n'ahantu h'amababa mu gihe c'indege — mu buryo bw'ubuhanga kurusha indege iyo ari yo yose. NASA na MIT bakora ikoranabuhanga ry'“ijaba rihindura imiterere” rikoresha ibikoresho bikwega na actuator kugira ngo bigane guhindura ijaba ry'inyoni, bishoboka ko bizamura akamaro kuri 8-12%.
kirundi.a_bird_feather_is_one_of_the_most_comp: Ikoya ry'inyoni ni kimwe mu bikorwa bigoye cane mu bidukikije. Ikoya ry'indege rifite:
kirundi.the_central_shaft_a_hollow_tube_strong: Igiti co hagati — umuyoboro w'umwobo, ukomeye kurusha icuma ku gipimo c'ibiro, wakozwe muri beta-keratine.
kirundi.microscopic_hooks_on_barbules_that_zip: Inkoni ntoya cane ku ba-barbule bihuza amashami nka fermeture, bikora ubuso budapfundikira umwuka. Iyo ikoya risakaye, inyoni ishobora kurikorora n'umunwa wayo ikongera “gupfundika” ryo.
kirundi.flight_feathers_are_asymmetric_the_lea: Amababa y'indege ntabwo angana — urupapuro rw'impera y'imbere ni ruto kurusha impera yo inyuma. Uku kudangana bikora imiterere ya airfoil igoramye ikora kuzamura, nk'ijaba ry'indege. Amababa y'ibanze ku mpera z'amababa aritsa mu gihe co gukubita-hasi, akora nk'amababa ya propela buri kimwe.
kirundi.typically_after_breeding_season_and_be: , akenshi nyuma y'igihe co kororoka na mbere yo kwimuka. Gutakaza amababa menshi icarimwe bishobora gutuma inyoni idashobora kuguruka, bityo gutakara kw'amababa bikurikira uburinganire bw'impande ebyiri buhamye: amababa ahuye ku buri jaba ahindurwa icarimwe.
kirundi.consider_a_ruby_throated_hummingbird_c: Iyumvira Ruby-throated Hummingbird yambuka Ikigobe ca Mexico (kilometero 500 idahagarara):
kirundi.that_is_an_incredibly_thin_margin_a_st: Uwo ni umupaka muto cane utangaje. Umuyaga ukomeye wo imbere, imbere y'ubukonje, canke kugera ku nkombe hamwe no kubura ibiro vya 10% bishobora kuba urupfu. Ni yo mpamvu ubwiza bw'ahantu ho gutura ho guhagarara ari
kirundi.literally_life_or_death: ikibazo c'ubuzima canke urupfu mu vy'ukuri
kirundi.animated_night_sky_showing_nocturnal_b: Ikirere c'ijoro c'animasiyo cerekana kwimuka kw'inyoni z'ijoro. Inyenyeri zirabagirana hafi y'Inyenyeri y'Amajaruguru, imirongo y'umurima wa rukuruzi igoramye mu kirere, kandi umukumbi muto wimuka unyuze mu ishusho. Cerekana uko inyoni zikoresha inyenyeri no kumva rukuruzi mu kuyobora kw'ijoro.
kirundi.guide_a_flock_of_canada_geese_from_the: Yobora umukumbi wa Canada Geese uva ahantu hazo ho kororokera mu majaruguru ya Canada ukagera ahantu hazo ho gutura mu gihe c'itumba muri Amerika y'Amajepfo. Fata ivyemezo ku kirere, ahantu ho kuruhuka n'inzira. Ushobora kugeza umukumbi mu rugo mu mahoro?
kirundi.migratory_birds_face_growing_dangers_u: Inyoni zimuka zihura n'ivyago biriyongera. Kumva ibi vyago ni intambwe ya mbere yo kubungabunga.
kirundi.turn_off_unnecessary_lights_during_spr: Zimya amatara adakenewe mu gihe co kwimuka kw'impeshi n'itumba (Ntwarante-Rusama, Myandagaro-Munyonyo). N'inyubako imwe yijimye ishobora gukiza amagana y'inyoni ku ijoro.
kirundi.apply_bird_safe_decals_to_windows_bird: Shira ibimenyetso birinda inyoni ku madirisha. Inyoni zibona muri ikirahure ishusho y'ikirere n'ibiti, ntabwo ari ikirahure ubwaco. Ibimenyetso bishizwe ku ntera ya sm 5 bimena amashusho.
kirundi.plant_native_trees_and_shrubs_that_pro: Tera ibiti n'ibihuru vy'igihugu bikora imbuto kandi bikurura udukoko — lisansi y'ingenzi ku nyoni zimuka. Ibimera bidasanzwe vy'igihugu akenshi ntabwo bifite udukoko inyoni zikeneye.
kirundi.use_apps_like_ebird_cornell_lab_to_rep: Koresha porogaramu nka eBird (Cornell Lab) kugira ngo utange raporo yo kwitegereza inyoni. Amakuru yawe afasha abahanga gukurikirana igihe co kwimuka n'ibigenda vy'umubare.
kirundi.advocate_for_wetland_protection_and_re: Vugira kurengera ibishanga no gushira ingufu z'umuyaga mu buryo bwuzuye inshingano mu muryango wawe.
kirundi.are_in_the_air_over_north_america_simu: ziba mu kirere hejuru ya Amerika y'Amajaruguru icarimwe. Sitasiyo za radar y'ikirere zimenya ibicu binini vy'inyoni zimuka ziguruka izuba rirenga. Ushobora kuraba kwimuka mu gihe nyaco kuri BirdCast (birdcast.info).
kirundi.to_calibrate_their_star_compass_at_dus: kugira ngo zishireho busole yazo y'inyenyeri mu mugoroba.
kirundi.of_birds_may_work_through_quantum_mech: kw'inyoni bishobora gukora binyuze mu mekanike ya quantum. Poroteyine za cryptochrome mu maso y'inyoni zishobora gukoresha ihuriro rya quantum kugira ngo zimenye umurima wa rukuruzi w'Isi — bituma kuyobora kw'inyoni kuba kimwe mu bikorwa bike vy'ibinyabuzima bishingira kuri fiziki ya quantum.
kirundi.of_sunlight_even_through_heavy_cloud_c: bw'urumuri rw'izuba ndetse no binyuze mu bicu biremereye, bikoresha ba-cône bihariye vyumva UV muri retine yabo. Ibi bisigura ndetse no ku minsi y'ibicu inyoni zishobora kumenya ahantu h'izuba kandi zikagumana inzira yazo.
kirundi.the_brain_s_memory_center_is_significa: (ikigo c'ububiko bw'ubwonko) ni kinini cane mu bwoko bw'inyoni zimuka kuruta ubwoko butimuka. Mu vy'ukuri kirakura mu gihe co kwimuka, congera ba-neuron bashasha mu buryo bwitwa neurogenesis y'abakuru. Kigabanuka nanone nyuma yo kwimuka. Iyi plastiki y'ibihe y'ubwonko ni agace k'ingenzi ka siyansi y'imyakura.
kirundi.back_to_stem_lab_tool_list: Subira ku rutonde rw'ibikoresho vya STEM Lab
kirundi.migration_wind_lab_sections: Ibice vya Laboratwari yo Kwimuka n'Umuyaga
kirundi.energy_budget_50_of_distance_bird_woul: Ingengo y'ingufu < 50% vy'intera — inyoni yaba ipfa n'inzara hagati mu nzira. Guhagarara ni itegeko.
kirundi.energy_budget_near_distance_possible_w: Ingengo y'ingufu hafi y'intera — bishoboka hamwe n'umuyaga wuzuye wo inyuma, bitaba ivyo guhagarara ni itegeko.
kirundi.3_reserve_either_short_distance_or_ove: Ububiko bwa 3× canke birenga. Canke intera ngufi canke ububiko bw'ibinure bw'inyongera.
kirundi.pick_wingspan_mass_headwind_formation_: Toranya ubugari bw'ijaba, ibiro, umuyaga wo imbere, imiterere n'intera. Hanura imiterere y'ingufu. Nta amanota, nta kugaragaza.
kirundi.your_hypothesis_which_parameter_forces: Iciyumviro cawe (ni iyihe parametero itera guhagarara kwinshi kurusha?)
kirundi.e_g_v_formation_savings_only_pay_off_a: urugero Kubika kw'imiterere ya V bitanga inyungu gusa hejuru ya km 1,500, kubera ko igiciro c'indege kiganje...
kirundi.a_10_m_s_headwind_doubles_the_work_wha: Umuyaga wo imbere wa 10 m/s wongera kabiri akazi — bizagenda bite nimba igice c'urugendo gifite umuyaga wo inyuma wa 10 m/s?
kirundi.why_is_v_formation_savings_about_22_wh: Kuki kubika kw'imiterere ya V ari hafi 22%? Ni ikihe giciro cayo ku nyoni iyobora?
kirundi.how_does_a_hummingbird_4_g_1500_km_gul: Ni gute hummingbird (garamu 4, kwambuka Ikigobe ca Mexico km 1,500) irokoka kwimuka kwayo?
kirundi.i_can_explain_why_this_profile_yields_: Nshobora gusigura impamvu iyi profayili itanga iyi miterere y'ingufu.
kirundi.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Widget y'iperereza — nta amanota, nta kugaragaza, nta mwuzure w'ibisubizo. Icitegererezo c'ingufu ni icy'urugero (gukurura ∝ m^0.67 / ubugari bw'ijaba). Kubika kw'imiterere ya V bitandukanye ~10 kugeza 30% bitewe n'ubwoko n'ahantu (Lissaman & Shollenberger 1970, umupaka wo hejuru w'inyigisho; ibipimo mu ndege birimwo Weimerskirch et al. 2001 ku bapelikani na Portugal et al. 2014 ku ba-ibis). Widget ikoresha 22% nk'igereranyo co hagati. Ku bijanye n'ubumenyi bw'ibinyabuzima nyabwo bw'ahantu ho guhagarara, raba ibitabo vy'ibanze.
kirundi.birds_read_pressure_gradients_we_canno: Inyoni zisoma ba-gradient b'umuvuduko tudashobora kumva. Umwuka-hejuru, umugezi w'impinga n'inkingi z'ubushuhe ni inzira inyamanswa ziguruka kilometero amagana zitwika hafi kalori zeru.
kirundi.four_major_north_american_flyways_paci: Inzira enye nkuru zo kuguruka za Amerika y'Amajaruguru (Pasifike, Hagati, Mississippi, Atlantike) ziyobora miliyari z'inyoni inshuro ebyiri ku mwaka. Maine iri ku mutwe w'inzira yo kuguruka ya Atlantike.
kirundi.wing_shape_aspect_ratio_camber_tunes_l: Imiterere y'ijaba (igipimo c'imiterere + kugoramuka) ihuza kuzamura ku gukurura. Inyoni ziguruka = igipimo c'imiterere co hejuru, gukubita ijaba gahoro. Ba-hummingbird = igipimo c'imiterere co hasi, gukubita ijaba birenga 60 Hz.
kirundi.birds_use_multiple_cues_simultaneously: Inyoni zikoresha ibimenyetso vyinshi icarimwe — busole y'izuba, umurima wa rukuruzi binyuze muri cryptochrome mu jisho, uburyo bw'inyenyeri n'ibimenyetso vy'ubutaka vyize. Zirakomeye ku gutakaza ikimenyetso ico ari co cose kimwe.
